reasoning: Hou Yifan is the current #1 ranked female player with a rating of 2613 as of December 2025. Her closest competitor, Zhu Jiner, has a rating of 2579, creating a substantial 34-point gap. FIDE rating lists update on the 1st of every month, meaning on the first resolution date (2025-12-28), the December list will still be active, virtually guaranteeing Hou Yifan retains her #1 rank. By January and March 2026, the gap remains very difficult for Zhu Jiner (or others) to close, as gaining 34+ points at the ~2600 level requires significant overperformance over many games. Furthermore, Hou Yifan participated in the Women's World Team Championship in Nov 2025, neutralizing any risk of her being unlisted due to inactivity. While Zhu Jiner has had a meteoric rise recently, closing a 34-point gap in 1-3 months under normal tournament conditions is statistically unlikely. Uncertainty increases slightly for the March date to account for potential huge tournament performances by rivals like Zhu Jiner in Jan/Feb (e.g., at Tata Steel).
